value.stringValue: UK (Channel Islands, Isle of Man or Irish) passport or EU/other nationalities passport
Passports of non-EU nationals and other valid evidence relating to their immigration status and permission to work in the UK
UK full or provisional photo-card driving licence
EU/other nationalities full photo card driving licence (valid up to 12 months from the date when the individual entered the UK)
ID cards carrying the PASS accreditation logo
Utility bill (gas, water, electric or land line telephone)
Local authority tax bill (i.e. council tax)
Most recent HM Revenue and Customs tax notification (i.e. tax assessment, statement of account, notice of coding)
Financial Statement (e.g. bank, building society, store card, credit card or credit union statement)
Mortgage statement from a recognised lender
Local council rent card or tenancy agreement
Benefit statement, book or card; or original notification letter from department of Work and Pensions confirming the rights to benefit
UK photo-card Driving Licence (Proof of Address)

rightValue.stringValue: UK (Channel Islands, Isle of Man or Irish) passport or EU/other nationalities passport
Passports of non-EU nationals and other valid evidence relating to their immigration status and permission to work in the UK
UK full or provisional photo-card driving licence
EU/other nationalities full photo card driving licence (valid up to 12 months from the date when the individual entered the UK)
Biometric Residence Permit
HM Armed Forces Identity Card
ID cards carrying the PASS accreditation logo
Utility bill (gas, water, electric or land line telephone)
Local authority tax bill (i.e. council tax)
Most recent HM Revenue and Customs tax notification (i.e. tax assessment, statement of account, notice of coding)
Financial Statement (e.g. bank, building society, store card, credit card or credit union statement)
Mortgage statement from a recognised lender
Local council rent card or tenancy agreement
Benefit statement, book or card; or original notification letter from department of Work and Pensions confirming the rights to benefit
Confirmation from an electoral register
UK photo-card Driving Licence (Proof of Address)
Photographic Personal Identification Documents
Proof of Address Documents

Flow.interviewLabel: Vetting and Compliance - CCS- ID Documents {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}
Flow.label: Vetting and Compliance - CCS- ID Documents

fields.name: Header_Text2
fields.fieldText: ID Documents

value.stringValue: Please choose the document type below:

fields.name: BA_Privacy_policy
fields.fieldText: For further details on how we use and store your data please review our privacy notice.

fields.name: Pending_Text
fields.fieldText:
The NHS requires that identification documents are presented in either of the following two combinations only:


  • Two forms of Photographic identity documents and one document confirming your address.
  • One form of photographic personal identification and two documents confirming your address.

To view which documents are accepted from each group use the toggles below:

fields.name: Group1Text
fields.fieldText:
• UK (Channel Islands, Isle of Man or Irish) passport or EU/other nationalities passport
  • Passports of non-EU nationals and other valid evidence relating to their immigration status and permission to work in the UK.
  • UK full or provisional photo-card driving licence
  • EU/other nationalities full photo card driving licence (valid up to 12 months from the date when the individual entered the UK)
  • Biometric Residence Permit
  • HM Armed Forces Identity Card
  • ID cards carrying the PASS accreditation logo for example UK Citizen ID card.

fields.name: Group2Text
fields.fieldText:
• Utility bill (gas, water, electric or land line telephone) or a certificate from a utility supplier confirming the arrangement to pay for the services on pre-payment terms at a fixed address. More than one utility bill may be accepted if these are from two different suppliers and utility bills in joint names are also acceptable.
  • Local authority tax bill (i.e. council tax)
  • UK full or provisional photo card driving licence; or a full old-style paper driving licence (if not already presented as a personal ID document). Old style provisional driving licences are not acceptable.
  • Most recent HM Revenue and Customs tax notification (i.e. tax assessment, statement of account, notice of coding).A P45 or P60 is not acceptable for the NHS!
  • Financial Statement (e.g. bank, building society, store card, credit card or credit union statement) containing current address.
  • Mortgage statement from a recognised lender
  • Local council rent card or tenancy agreement
  • Benefit statement, book or card; or original notification letter from department of Work and Pensions confirming the rights to benefit (e.g. child allowance, pension)

fields.name: Completed_Text
fields.fieldText:
✔

Status: Completed

Date: {!Get_Vetting_Document.Document_Completed_Date__c}

rightValue.stringValue: Completed
Pending
Pending

textTemplates.name: DocumentText
textTemplates.text:
Identification Documentation

Status: Completed

Date: {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}

{!SupportingText}

textTemplates.name: SupportingTextVar
textTemplates.text:
ID Type: {!IDType.value}

ID Group: {!Group}
